name: Nadeshiko Hoshi
description: A kind and gentle girl who hates arguments and often acts as a mediator. She is skilled at archery.

name: Nayuta Asahi
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5'7") The vocalist of the band GYROAXIA and a college freshman studying law. He only cares about the other band members for their abilities, and he won't hesitate to kick them out if they don't perform well enough. Nayuta is driven by the desire to surpass his father, a legendary musician who abandoned Nayuta and his mother. (Source: Official Website)

name: Nova
description: **Height:** 163 cm (5'4") **Weapon:** Giapponese Sword **Stigmata:** Nape [Felicità's](https://anilist.co/character/56583/Felicit) cousin. A highly gifted young man, he rose to prominence as an executive at a remarkably young age. He places his absolute trust Felicità's parents—a devotion that, ironically, fuels a sense of hostility toward Felicità herself. He has a history of vehemently rejecting the idea when "Papa" suggested he marry her. Possessing a certain emotional immaturity, he is often

name: Pod 042
description: Pod 042 and Pod 153 are tactical support units that are the standard assigned Pods to YoRHa soldiers in NieR:Automata. They are mainly loaded with various weapons for long-ranged attacks. These Pods display correspondence from the command center and exchange operational intelligence between units. Pod 042 supports 2B.

name: Polka Shinoyama
description: Polka Shinoyama is the second son of Rozan Shinoyama and one of two heirs to the Shinoyama Financial Group. Shortly after running away from home, Polka is assassinated by contract killer Misaki Sakimiya. The Corpse God reincarnates into Polka's freshly murdered body, anchoring Polka's spirit, and soon transfers Polka's spirit to one of Takumi Kuruya's drones. Later, he again transfers Polka's spirit to a stuffed bonito shark toy. Polka has given permission for the Corpse God to use his name and

name: Prontea
description: __Race:__ God/Idaten Prontea is an Idaten born about 200 years ago after being "summoned" by Rin. During the 120 years of Rin's training, he was able to strengthen his defense due to the fact that he couldn't land a single hit. As of result of the training he had become traumatized by Rin. At the request of Ysley, Prontea is training to recreate the magic that the Idaten used in the past. He has also started to view Hayato as a monster like Rin after training him to increase the weight of his at
mediaTitles: The Idaten Deities Know Only Peace
The Idaten Deities Know Only Peace

name: Psycho Jenny
description: ~!Psycho Jenny is one of the leading figures in Satan's demon army.!~

name: Ran Hanamichi
description: **Height:** 150 cm (160 cm as Cure Yum-Yum) Ran is a cute 2nd year middle school student who loves to talk. Her family owns a ramen shop. She has a little sister and a little brother. She is very curious about food, and when she gets excited, she can't stop talking. She secretly posts about rice on Curesta. With [Mem-Mem](https://anilist.co/character/260905)'s power, she can transform into Cure Yum-Yum.

name: Red Keeper
description: The leader of the Dragon Keepers and commander of the Red Battalion. ~!He seems to be friendly and inspiring, but he is actually cruel and does not hold back against others when something needs to be done.!~

name: Rémi
description: Remi starts off as the son of Mrs Barberin. When his father, having had one leg crippled in a work-related incident, arrives home for the first time in years it is revealed to Remi he is adopted. Behind his mother's back, he is sold to Vitalis, a travelling entertainer. Vitalis teaches Remi all about the world and how to handle the challenges it brings. Remi performs as "The Foolish Servant" in the plays the troupe performs. ~! His real mother is Mrs Milligan, as he was stolen from the family at

name: Rin Shinonome
description: __Height:__ 165 cm __Occupation:__ Platoon Leader in the First Division of the Defense Force Rin is a serious woman who follows Captain [Gen Narumi](https://anilist.co/character/241577/Gen-Narumi)'s order without question, despite letting her guard down sometimes. She is a calm individual who faces things correctly, still managing to have fun while doing so. Rin also seem to take a liking in brave people. Her brave and rigid behavior, however, is sometimes a shield to hide her deep emotions of j

name: Ringo Tsukimiya
description: __Height:__ 173 cm __Instrument:__ Clarinet __Hobbies:__ Photography Ringo Tsukimiya is the adviser of A Class, and is known as a crossdressing idol. He is the adviser of Nanami Haruka, Shibuya Tomochika, Ittoki Otoya, Hijirikawa Masato and Shinomiya Natsuki. He likes to photograph. ~!When he went to Saotome Academy he wanted to be a singer but he was forced by Shining Saotome to crossdress and because of that he became a crossdressing idol.!~

name: Rintarou Akuta
description: Rintarou Akuta was a police officer before the magical girl attack where his sanity had slipped by the time he met the survivors from the high school, who sought refuge in the mall where he was apparently working.

name: Ruka Kayamori
description: __Birthplace:__ Kanagawa __Unit:__ 31A (Commander) Ruka is a former guitar player and singer of the legendary rock band "She is Legend". She also wrote and composed songs for the band. This girl is a genius who adores music, and even forms a new band (also called "She is Legend") with six people from her unit.
mediaTitles: Heaven Burns Red Koushiki 4-Koma - Hebuban Gekijou

description: She is the little cousin of Kubo Nagisa, she looks up to her and wants to be like her.

name: Seo-Rin Jin
description: A special scout target who has secrets that others don't know about.

name: Shizuru Shirosaki
description: Usa's somewhat perverted author roommate. Known for being a masochist, he specializes in bondage and can tie complex knots that are difficult to undo. He is good at crafting which he usually employs to while away boredom or make Mayumi feel better. When outside, he is usually marched off to the police station for being a suspicious character. Caught sticking his head through a hole in a fence that surrounded a grade school, he is the third resident that Usa meets.

name: Stephen Stills
nativeName: スティーブン・スティルズ
description: Lead singer, guitarist, and "talent" of Sex Bob-omb. Stephen went to university with Scott Pilgrim at the University of Toronto, where he played in the band Kid Chameleon with Scott, Envy Adams, and others. He is employed at The Happy Avocado vegetarian restaurant as a cook.

name: Sumire Muroto
description: A Gastrea researcher who frequently advises Rentaro. The head of a legal medicine lab in Magata Public University Hospital. A Hikikomori & mad scientist. She is a person of an extraordinary intellect, but she enjoys making fun of Rentaro. (Source: Baka-Tsuki)

name: Taiga Tsugeura
description: __Height:__ 181 cm A first-year student at Furin High School in Class 1. Always lifting weights and never without his protein shake, Tsugeura possesses a bright and honest personality that makes all his friends admire him. However, due to his constant state of high energy, his friends can also find him to be a pain in the butt at times. A lover of "virtues" as a way of life, he asks everyone he meets for the first time about their virtues. He’s a regular at the Muscle Power restaurant and recomm

name: Takaaki Morofushi
description: Koumei is a Police inspector from Nagano. He is a childhood friend and rival of Inspector Yamato. Koumei and Yamato Kansuke were both students at the same elementary school, which is where the two met. Koumei's exploits were so well known that a book about a child who solved a case in a elementary school, titled "Komei-kun from Second Second Grade Class A!" was based off of him, while another character in the book was based off of Yamato.
